summary: Zones tab merge into Map tab testing COMPLETE. All features verified working correctly. The separate Zones tab has been removed and zones now appear BELOW the map in the Map tab. Tabs reduced from 5 to 4: Map (with zones below), Changes, Density, Stats. All bidirectional interactions, edit/remove buttons, collapsible removed zones section, and restore functionality working as expected.

tab_structure: ONLY 4 tabs exist (NOT 5): الخريطة (Map), التغييرات (Changes), الكثافات (Density), إحصائيات (Stats)
NO separate Zones tab (tab-zones) - correctly removed
Map tab shows badge with active zones count (updates dynamically)
zones_below_map: Zone cards display below the map inside Map tab
Zone cards show: zone_code (TEST-ZONE-1), name (منطقة اختبار للتحقق), category (مصلى رجال), color icon (M), change_type badge (مضاف/Added)
zone_card_interactions: Edit button (edit-zone-btn-{id}) visible and clickable on each zone card
Remove button (remove-zone-btn-{id}) visible and clickable on each zone card
Clicking zone card selects zone on map (blue highlight visible)
Zone card gets selected state (blue border/ring) when clicked
bidirectional_map_interaction: Clicking zone card enables edit mode and selects zone on map
Edit mode shows 'نسخ' (Copy) and 'إزالة' (Remove) buttons in toolbar
Instruction text appears: 'انقر على منطقة لتحديدها...' (Click zone to select)
removed_zones_collapsible: removed-zones-section appears when zones are removed
toggle-removed-zones button visible with ChevronRight icon
Removed zone cards show with red styling and strikethrough
Restore button (restore-zone-btn-{id}) appears on removed zone cards
Restore button works - zone returns to active zones
changes_tab: Shows changed zones with appropriate badges (تم الإزالة/Removed)
Zone code, name, and category displayed in change items
density_tab: Density tab shows occupancy stats (نسبة الإشغال)
Stats cards: Current count, Critical zones, High zones
Zone density table with editable inputs (current count, max capacity)
stats_tab: Stats tab shows summary cards: Active zones, Removed zones, Changes, Categories used
Category details table (تفصيل الفئات) with percentages
drawing_tools: Pan mode (hand icon) works for map navigation
Draw mode (pencil) available for freeform drawing
Rectangle mode (square) works - drew TEST-ZONE-1 successfully
Edit mode (pointer) enables zone selection and editing

critical_code_review_comments: DailySessionsPage.jsx correctly implements zones-below-map at lines 1267-1343
Removed zones collapsible section at lines 1345-1384 with proper toggle state
TabsList changed from 5 to 4 tabs (grid-cols-4) at line 1052
Map tab badge shows activeZones.length correctly
Bidirectional zone selection implemented via zoneCardsRef and scroll-into-view
seed_data_creation: Created TEST-ZONE-1 on basement floor session for Feb 18, 2026 to test zones-below-map functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the zones tab merge into Map tab. Key data-testids: tab-map, tab-changes, tab-density, tab-stats, zones-below-map, zone-card-{id}, edit-zone-btn-{id}, remove-zone-btn-{id}, removed-zones-section, toggle-removed-zones, restore-zone-btn-{id}. The TEST-ZONE-1 zone exists on basement floor (طابق البدروم) session for Feb 18, 2026. Other tabs (Changes, Density, Stats) all working correctly.

4_tabs_only.details: Only 4 tabs: Map, Changes, Density, Stats - NO Zones tab

map_tab_badge.details: Map tab shows active zones count badge (e.g., 'الخريطة1')

zones_below_map.details: Zone cards appear BELOW the map in Map tab with all details

zone_card_buttons.details: Edit and Remove buttons visible on each zone card

bidirectional_selection.details: Clicking zone card selects zone on map, enables edit mode

removed_zones_collapsible.details: Removed zones section is collapsible, hidden by default, with restore functionality

changes_tab.details: Shows changes summary with zone details and change type badges

density_tab.details: Shows occupancy stats, zone density table, heat map

stats_tab.details: Shows summary cards, category distribution chart, details table

drawing_tools.details: Pan, Draw, Rectangle, Edit modes all working
